title: Draper 10109 Medium - Coarse Grit Flexible Sanding Sponge , Blue
features: • Dense foam sponge with medium/coarse grades of abrasive grit

description: Draper dense foam sponge with medium/coarse grades of abrasive grit. Ideal for sanding angles, contoured or flat surfaces. Extremely convenient and easy to use. Measures 10.2 cm length by 2.3 cm width by 7 cm height.
